description: Local Cesium agent-plugin registry used for discovery and offline testing.

plugins.description: Fetch current documentation and code examples for libraries and frameworks.

skills.title: Use Context7 Docs
skills.description: Look up library documentation before answering API or framework questions.
skills.body:
Use Context7 when the user asks about libraries, frameworks, SDKs, APIs, or CLI usage.
Prefer fetched documentation over memory for version-sensitive syntax, setup, and migration guidance.

plugins.description: Read and update Linear issues, comments, teams, and project metadata.

skills.title: Linear Workflow
skills.description: Use Linear context for issue-driven implementation work.
skills.body:
When the user references a Linear issue, fetch the issue and relevant comments before planning or editing.
Keep issue status, acceptance criteria, and implementation notes aligned with the work performed.

plugins.description: Search, create, and update Notion pages, databases, tasks, and documentation.

skills.title: Notion Knowledge Capture
skills.description: Use Notion as a structured workspace for tasks and documentation.
skills.body:
Use Notion tools for workspace knowledge, task creation, database queries, and documentation capture.
Prefer structured page/database operations over unstructured prose when updating Notion.
